summary: TWO_COLUMN residue theorem for f(z)=1/(z²+1). LEFT ComplexPlane with RED poles at ±i + YELLOW growing circle via ValueTracker r_tr (radius tour through 1.5, 0.5, 2.0, 0.8, 1.2). always_redraw contour. RIGHT shows live poles-inside count and numerical integral via 500-point Riemann sum on circle — approaches π for r>1, 0 for r<1.
